title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus & Accommodation Tour Details
text: Campus & accommodation tour 03 August Event Status: Completed Date & Time: August 03, 2025 11:00 AM IST Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India
summary: This chunk provides the details for the University of Southampton Delhi's Campus and Accommodation Tour on August 3, 2025, including its location and completed status.

title: Explore State-of-the-Art Facilities and Campus Life
text: Campus tour Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer.
summary: Experience an in-person campus tour at University of Southampton Delhi, exploring state-of-the-art facilities and vibrant campus life firsthand.

title: University of Southampton Delhi Student Accommodation Tour
text: Accommodation tour Our student hostel is a home away from home during study at University of Southampton Delhi. Tour the peaceful residential Suncity location only 6km away from campus. Take the shuttlebus from campus, and then return back to campus when the accommodation tour has finished. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India
summary: Tour the University of Southampton Delhi student hostel in Suncity, a peaceful residential area 6km from campus, with shuttle bus transport provided.
